title: AI in Creativity and Arts

modules.title: AI-Generated Art and Music
modules.sub: How machines produce creative works across artistic disciplines
modules.description: Learners examine the technical foundations behind AI systems that generate visual art, music, and other creative outputs. They analyze real-world examples to assess the aesthetic and cultural qualities of machine-made work. By the end, they form an informed perspective on what distinguishes AI-generated creativity from human expression.

modules.title: Creative Collaboration with AI
modules.sub: Partnering with AI tools to expand your creative practice
modules.description: Learners explore practical workflows where human artists and AI systems work together to produce creative outputs. They experiment with collaborative models, evaluating where AI augments rather than replaces human intent and skill. This module challenges them to redefine authorship and creative agency in a hybrid process.

modules.title: Intellectual Property Questions
modules.sub: Navigating copyright, ownership, and rights in AI creativity
modules.description: Learners investigate the unresolved legal and ethical questions surrounding ownership of AI-generated and AI-assisted works. They work through case studies involving training data, derivative works, and attribution disputes to understand the current regulatory landscape. They leave equipped to make defensible decisions about IP in their own creative or professional contexts.

modules.title: Future of Human Creativity
modules.sub: Envisioning human creative identity in an AI-saturated world
modules.description: Learners reflect on how AI is reshaping the cultural, economic, and psychological dimensions of creative work. They evaluate competing scenarios for how artists, designers, and writers might adapt their roles and value propositions over the coming decade. The module closes with learners articulating a personal or organizational stance on embracing, guiding, or resisting AI's creative influence.

synopsis: Explore how AI creates art, music, and literature alongside human artists. Examine the changing relationship between technology and human creativity.
